name: PrimTorch
description: DEPRECATED branding for the operator decomposition layer. The concept of decompositions is still valid (see 'decompositions' in active components).
note: Peng: PrimTorch is deprecated. Decompositions as a concept remains valid. Flagged to Beaver for research on deprecation status in official docs.

name: Compiled Autograd
description: Compiles the backward pass through autograd engine — not widely used
note: Peng: not used widely, may drop from the taxonomy

name: DDPOptimizer
description: Optimizes compiled graphs for distributed data parallel training — not recommended
note: Peng: not used much, not recommended

name: Compiled FSDP
description: torch.compile integration with FSDP — project approach abandoned
